stemHtml:
Given the following information, if the engine of a single-engined aeroplane fails at this altitude, what should be the expected net glide ground distance for a glide to MSL?

Altitude: 11 000 ft
L/D: 20
Elevation: 0 ft
Wind: 0 kt
Assume 1 NM = 6080 ft
Still Air Distance = (Height difference / Net gradients) x 100
